name: Ancient Sword Love
original_name: និស្ស័យស្នេហ៍ដាវបុរាណ វគ្គ2
overview: China: Newly-emerging but famous actress Huang Yang Dian Tian has been revealed that she has been cast as the female lead in a new drama titled "Magic Sword Temperament". "Everyone knows that the old actress in this movie is played by Liu Yifei.According to Chinese Paladin producers, 14-year-old actress Huang Yang Dian Tian has been replaced by Liu Yifei, who is 10 years older than she is. She is beautiful and has acting skills, which is why she was chosen to replace other famous actresses.

trailers.title: 【古剑奇谭二】终极预告 付辛博、颖儿、李治廷、张智尧 | Swords of Legends II - Trailer
